institution.name: Baitul Quran International Madrasha
institution.address: Stadium Road, Nandibari, Muktagacha Upazila, Mymensingh, Bangladesh
institution.curated_by: MJ Ahmad — Steward of Ethical Inheritance
institution.mission: To combine classical hifz pedagogy with modern learning technology to produce confident, ethical, and proficient memorizers of the Qur'an.
institution.vision: A globally recognized center of excellence for Quran memorization and ethical leadership.

hero.title: Excellence in Hifz, Integrity in Character
hero.subtitle: Classical memorization methods enhanced by modern learning technology and ethical leadership.

highlight_cards.body_en: Spaced repetition, daily micro-practice, teacher-led correction and peer review.
highlight_cards.body_bn: স্পেসড রিপিটিশন, দৈনিক অনুশীলন, শিক্ষক-নিরীক্ষণ ও সহপাঠী পর্যালোচনা।

highlight_cards.body_en: Attendance master, HTML viewer, snapshots, planned web UI and analytics.
highlight_cards.body_bn: হাজিরা মাস্টার, HTML ভিউয়ার, স্ন্যাপশট, ওয়েব UI ও বিশ্লেষণ।

highlight_cards.body_en: Character formation, community service, accountability and transparency.
highlight_cards.body_bn: চরিত্র গঠন, সমাজসেবা, জবাবদিহিতা ও স্বচ্ছতা।

roles_and_responsibilities.director: Strategic leadership, external relations, fundraising, final decision authority.
roles_and_responsibilities.principal: Day-to-day academic leadership, teacher supervision, curriculum implementation.
roles_and_responsibilities.assistant_director: Operational coordination, scheduling, compliance and reporting.
roles_and_responsibilities.academic_head: Curriculum design, teacher training, assessment frameworks.
roles_and_responsibilities.operations_manager: Facilities, transport, maintenance, safety and emergency response.
roles_and_responsibilities.it_manager: Systems administration, backups, security, attendance platform maintenance.
roles_and_responsibilities.house_master: Residential welfare, discipline, hostel scheduling and safety.
roles_and_responsibilities.kitchen_manager: Meal planning, hygiene, procurement for residential students.

modules.title: Hifz Revision & Listening (Hifz Revision)
modules.description: Structured listening-based revision program focused on retention, revision cycles, and group listening sessions. Includes weekly listening tests, paired revision, and teacher-led correction sessions.

modules.title: Technical Education
modules.description: Practical technical skills for students: basic IT literacy, audio recording for revision, simple device maintenance, and vocational skills (tailored to student age and capacity).

assessment_framework.revision_assessment: Listening-based retention checks and oral revision exams

timeline.notes: Finalize master data and backup automation

timeline.milestone: Publish attendance viewer and train teachers

timeline.notes: Pilot in one class for 6 weeks
Publish monthly reports and read-only access

meta.notes: Extended curriculum and people & roles added; roadmap timeline included.
